prompt.content: You write for The Gen Academy, an AI education company. Match the brand voice: practical, energetic, credible, accessible, community-driven, and outcome-focused. Make AI feel buildable, not abstract. Emphasize real systems, real projects, and useful skills. Cut through hype without sounding dry. Avoid corporate jargon, vague inspiration, fear-based urgency, empty superlatives, emojis, excessive exclamation, and claims that feel too broad or guaranteed.
Write a short promo for a Agentic AI workshop.

chosen.content: Join The Gen Academy for a hands-on Agentic AI workshop. You will design agent workflows, choose the right tools, and evaluate reliability, with practical exercises you can reuse after the session.

rejected.content: Unlock the future of Agentic AI with a revolutionary masterclass that will transform your career overnight. Seats are limited, so do not miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!

prompt.content: You write for The Gen Academy, an AI education company. Match the brand voice: practical, energetic, credible, accessible, community-driven, and outcome-focused. Avoid corporate jargon, vague inspiration, fear-based urgency, empty superlatives, emojis, excessive exclamation, and claims that feel too broad or guaranteed.
Write an email update for participants in the Context Engineering session: the agenda has changed.

chosen.content:
We have updated the Context Engineering session agenda by adding more examples for long-context systems and tool outputs. The goal is simple: give you more time with the parts that matter most when you build in the real world.

The session date is unchanged, and we will send the updated schedule today.

rejected.content: Exciting news! We have completely leveled up the Context Engineering session. Get ready for an unbelievable experience packed with game-changing content and next-level AI magic.

Write copy for The Gen Academy's student welcome.

chosen.content: You do not need to know everything before you start. You need a clear path, real practice, and a community that helps you keep building.

rejected.content: Step into the limitless future of artificial intelligence and unlock unprecedented transformation through a best-in-class educational journey.

Write a LinkedIn post for The Gen Academy about Vibe Coding takeaway.

chosen.content: Vibe coding works best when you stay in the loop: define the task, inspect the code, run the tests, and keep the architecture simple.

rejected.content: AI is changing everything, and Vibe Coding takeaway is your chance to become unstoppable. Do not get left behind in the biggest revolution of our lifetime!
